entities.name: FOOD GRAIN LEGUMES
entities.description: Legumes used as food grains that contain various antinutritional factors

entities.name: ANTI-NUTRITIONAL FACTORS
entities.description: Factors in food grain legumes that interfere with the absorption of nutrients

entities.name: PROTEASE INHIBITORS
entities.description: Antinutritional factors that inhibit protease enzymes, including trypsin and chymotrypsin inhibitors

entities.name: TRYPSIN INHIBITORS
entities.description: Specific protease inhibitors that inhibit the enzyme trypsin

entities.name: CHYMOTRYPSIN INHIBITORS
entities.description: Specific protease inhibitors that inhibit the enzyme chymotrypsin

entities.name: AMYLASE INHIBITORS
entities.description: Antinutritional factors that inhibit amylase enzymes

entities.name: FLATULENCE CAUSING SUGARS
entities.description: Sugars in legumes that cause flatulence, specifically oligosaccharides

entities.name: OLIGOSACCHARIDES
entities.description: Sugars responsible for causing flatulence in legume seeds

entities.name: POLYPHENOLS
entities.description: Antinutritional factors found in the seeds of chickpea and pigeonpea

entities.name: PHYTIC ACID
entities.description: Antinutritional factor found in the seeds of chickpea and pigeonpea

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A food grain legume studied for its antinutritional factors

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A food grain legume studied for its antinutritional factors
